cardPlayed.name: Show of Strength
cardPlayed.text:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Draw 1 for each of your [Mighty] units. (A unit is Mighty while it has 5+ :rb_might:.).

cardPlayed.name: Promising Future
cardPlayed.text: Each player looks at the top 5 cards of their Main Deck, chooses one, then recycles the rest. Starting with the next player, each player plays those cards, ignoring Energy costs. (They must still pay Power costs.).

cardPlayed.name: Mobilize
cardPlayed.text: Channel 1 rune exhausted. If you can't, draw 1.

cardPlayed.name: Catalyst of Aeons
cardPlayed.text: Channel 2 runes exhausted. If you couldn't channel 2 runes this way, draw 1.

cardPlayed.name: Firestorm
cardPlayed.text: Deal 3 to all enemy units at a battlefield.

cardPlayed.name: Stacked Deck
cardPlayed.text:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Look at the top 3 cards of your Main Deck. Put 1 into your hand and recycle the rest.

cardPlayed.name: Stacked Deck
cardPlayed.text: ACTION (play on your turn or in showdowns.)  Look at the top 3 cards of your Main Deck. Put 1 into your hand and recycle the rest.

cardPlayed.name: Guards!
cardPlayed.text:
[Hidden]_ (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)_
Play a 2 :rb_might: Sand Soldier unit token. You may pay :rb_rune_order: to ready it.

cardPlayed.name: Against the Odds
cardPlayed.text:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Give a friendly unit at a battlefield +2 :rb_might: this turn for each enemy unit there.

cardPlayed.name: Hidden Blade
cardPlayed.text:
[Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Kill a unit at a battlefield. Its controller draws 2.

cardPlayed.name: Party Favors
cardPlayed.text: Each other player chooses Cards or Runes. For each player that chooses Cards, you and that player each draw 1. For each player that chooses Runes, you and that player each channel 1 rune exhausted.

cardPlayed.name: Noxian Guillotine
cardPlayed.text:
[Action]_ (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)_
Choose a unit. Kill it the next time it takes damage this turn.
[Legion] — Kill it now instead. (Get the effect if you've played another card this turn.).

cardPlayed.name: Wallop
cardPlayed.text:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
As you play this, you may spend a buff as an additional cost. If you do, ignore this spell's cost.
Ready a unit.

[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Double a friendly unit's Might this turn. Give it [Temporary]. (Kill it at the start of its controller's Beginning Phase, before scoring.).
